homepage.heroSubline: Durable concrete solutions built to last. Expert craftsmanship for Wichita homes and businesses.
aboutText: Groundworks began with a simple mission: to provide Wichita with reliable, high-quality concrete services. Founded by local craftsman, we understand the unique challenges our climate presents, from scorching summers to freezing winters that demand resilient concrete solutions.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring lasting results. Our values are rooted in integrity, transparency, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We believe in clear communication and collaborative partnerships with our clients.

Groundworks is deeply invested in the Wichita community. We source local materials whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. We're not just building concrete structures; we're building a stronger foundation for our city.

valueProps.title: Weather-Resistant Mixes
valueProps.description: Formulas designed to withstand Wichita's extreme temperatures and seasonal shifts.

valueProps.description: Experienced professionals committed to precision and quality in every project.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: Upfront and honest estimates with no hidden fees – just clear, reliable costs.

valueProps.title: On-Time Completion
valueProps.description: Dedicated to meeting deadlines and minimizing disruption to your schedule.

homepage.ctaSubline: Transform your property with durable, expertly installed concrete solutions. Contact us today!

services.name: Concrete Driveways
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish driveways designed for Wichita conditions.
services.description:
A well-constructed concrete driveway is more than just a place to park your car; it's a crucial element of your home's curb appeal and overall value. Groundworks specializes in designing and installing concrete driveways that are both aesthetically pleasing and built to withstand Wichita's harsh climate. From traditional broom finishes to decorative stamped concrete, we offer a wide range of options to complement your home's architecture. 

Our team meticulously prepares the subgrade, ensuring proper drainage and preventing cracking or settling over time. We use only high-quality concrete mixes, reinforced with steel or fiber as needed, to guarantee exceptional strength and longevity. We understand the freeze-thaw cycles of Kansas winters can wreak havoc on inferior concrete, so we take extra precautions to protect your investment. 

Whether you're looking to replace an existing driveway or install a new one, Groundworks will work closely with you to create a customized solution that meets your specific needs and budget. We handle everything from initial design and permitting to final grading and cleanup.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation and Design – We assess your property and discuss your design preferences.
Step 2: Excavation and Subgrade Preparation – Proper base preparation is crucial for a long-lasting driveway.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – Expert pouring and finishing techniques ensure a smooth, durable surface.
Step 4: Curing and Sealing – Proper curing protects the concrete and enhances its longevity.

faq.question: How long will a concrete driveway last in Wichita?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a Groundworks concrete driveway can last 25-30 years or more in Wichita's climate.

faq.question: What is the best way to maintain my concrete driveway?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning, sealing every few years, and prompt repair of any cracks will help extend the life of your driveway. Avoid de-icing salts that contain ammonium sulfate or ammonium nitrate, as these can damage concrete.

faq.question: Can you add color or stamping to my concrete driveway?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of decorative options, including colored concrete, stamped patterns, and exposed aggregate finishes to enhance the look of your driveway.

services.name: Concrete Patios
services.shortDescription: Create your outdoor oasis with a custom concrete patio.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into the perfect outdoor living space with a custom concrete patio from Groundworks. We specialize in designing and building patios that are both functional and beautiful, creating an inviting area for relaxation, entertaining, and enjoying the Wichita sunshine. From simple, classic designs to elaborate, multi-level patios, we can bring your vision to life.

We understand that a patio is an extension of your home, so we take the time to understand your lifestyle and design preferences. We offer a wide range of concrete finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete, to create a unique and personalized look. We also offer a variety of decorative options, such as borders, inlays, and fire pits, to enhance the ambiance of your outdoor space.

Our team handles every aspect of the patio construction process, from initial design and permitting to final grading and cleanup. We use only high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure that your patio is built to last. We also pay close attention to drainage, ensuring that your patio remains dry and comfortable, even during heavy rainstorms.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your vision and create a custom patio design.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the area by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – We pour and finish the concrete to your desired specifications.
Step 4: Curing and Sealing – We cure and seal the concrete to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: How much does a concrete patio cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a concrete patio varies depending on the size, design, and finishes. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: What is stamped concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete is a decorative concrete finish that mimics the look of brick, stone, or other materials. It is a cost-effective way to add visual interest to your patio.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a concrete patio?
faq.answer: The duration of a patio project depends on the size and complexity of the design. Most patios can be completed in 1-3 days.

services.name: Concrete Foundations
services.shortDescription: Solid foundations for homes and businesses in Wichita.
services.description:
The foundation is the backbone of any structure, providing crucial support and stability. Groundworks specializes in pouring reliable concrete foundations for new homes, additions, and commercial buildings. We understand the importance of a properly constructed foundation, especially in Wichita, where soil conditions and weather patterns can present unique challenges. 

Our team meticulously follows all building codes and industry best practices, ensuring that your foundation is built to last. We carefully prepare the site, ensuring proper drainage and compaction. We use only high-quality concrete mixes, reinforced with steel rebar as needed, to provide exceptional strength and durability. We also pay close attention to waterproofing, protecting your foundation from moisture damage.

Whether you're building a new home or adding an addition to your existing property, Groundworks will work closely with you to ensure that your foundation is built to the highest standards. We handle everything from initial site preparation and excavation to final grading and backfilling. Our goal is to provide you with a solid foundation that will support your structure for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site Survey and Excavation – We assess the site and prepare it for foundation construction.
Step 2: Formwork Installation – We install the forms that will shape the concrete.
Step 3: Reinforcement Installation – We install steel rebar to reinforce the concrete.
Step 4: Concrete Pouring and Curing – We pour and cure the concrete to ensure its strength and durability.

faq.question: How deep should a concrete foundation be?
faq.answer: The depth of a concrete foundation depends on local building codes and soil conditions. In Wichita, foundations typically need to extend below the frost line.

faq.question: What is the purpose of rebar in a concrete foundation?
faq.answer: Rebar provides tensile strength to the concrete, preventing it from cracking under stress.

faq.question: How long does it take for a concrete foundation to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but it can be loaded after 7 days.

services.name: Concrete Sidewalks
services.shortDescription: Safe and accessible sidewalks for your home or business.
services.description:
Ensure safe and easy access to your home or business with a professionally installed concrete sidewalk from Groundworks. We specialize in building durable and aesthetically pleasing sidewalks that meet all ADA requirements. Whether you need to replace an existing sidewalk or install a new one, we can provide a customized solution that meets your specific needs and budget.

We understand that sidewalks are subject to heavy foot traffic and exposure to the elements, so we use only high-quality concrete mixes and proven construction techniques to ensure that your sidewalk is built to last. We pay close attention to grading and drainage, preventing water from pooling and causing damage. We also offer a variety of decorative options, such as colored concrete and stamped patterns, to enhance the look of your property.

Our team handles every aspect of the sidewalk construction process, from initial site preparation and excavation to final grading and cleanup. We work quickly and efficiently to minimize disruption to your property and ensure that your new sidewalk is installed safely and professionally.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation and Excavation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 2: Formwork Installation – We install the forms that will shape the concrete.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – We pour and finish the concrete to create a smooth and durable surface.
Step 4: Curing and Sealing – We cure and seal the concrete to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: How wide should a concrete sidewalk be?
faq.answer: A concrete sidewalk should be at least 36 inches wide to meet ADA requirements.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent cracks in a concrete sidewalk?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, the use of high-quality concrete mixes, and the installation of expansion joints can help prevent cracks in a concrete sidewalk.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a concrete sidewalk?
faq.answer: The duration of a sidewalk project depends on the size and complexity of the design. Most sidewalks can be completed in 1-2 days.

services.name: Concrete Repairs
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs to restore your concrete surfaces.
services.description:
Cracked, chipped, or spalling concrete can be unsightly and dangerous. Groundworks offers expert concrete repair services to restore your concrete surfaces to their original condition. We specialize in repairing driveways, patios, sidewalks, foundations, and other concrete structures. We understand the causes of concrete damage and use proven repair techniques to ensure lasting results.

Our team begins by thoroughly assessing the damage to determine the best course of action. We use a variety of repair methods, including patching, resurfacing, and crack injection, depending on the severity of the damage. We use only high-quality repair materials that are specifically designed for concrete. We also pay close attention to color matching, ensuring that the repaired areas blend seamlessly with the surrounding concrete.

Whether you have a small crack in your driveway or a large spalling area on your patio, Groundworks can provide a cost-effective and reliable repair solution. We work quickly and efficiently to minimize disruption to your property and ensure that your concrete surfaces are safe and functional.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – We assess the extent of the damage and determine the best repair method.
Step 2: Surface Preparation – We prepare the surface by cleaning and removing any loose debris.
Step 3: Repair Material Application – We apply the appropriate repair material to the damaged area.
Step 4: Finishing and Curing – We finish and cure the repaired area to ensure its strength and durability.

faq.question: What causes concrete to crack?
faq.answer: Concrete can crack due to a variety of factors, including temperature changes, soil movement, and heavy loads.

faq.question: Can you repair a cracked concrete foundation?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair cracked concrete foundations using a variety of methods, including crack injection and patching.

faq.question: How long does it take to repair concrete?
faq.answer: The duration of a concrete repair project depends on the extent of the damage and the repair method used. Most repairs can be completed in 1-2 days.

services.name: Concrete Slabs
services.shortDescription: Durable concrete slabs for sheds, garages, and more.
services.description:
Need a solid, level surface for your shed, garage, or other outdoor structure? Groundworks specializes in pouring durable concrete slabs that provide a stable foundation for your projects. We understand the importance of a properly constructed slab, especially in Wichita, where soil conditions and weather patterns can present unique challenges.

Our team meticulously prepares the site, ensuring proper drainage and compaction. We use only high-quality concrete mixes, reinforced with steel mesh or fiber as needed, to provide exceptional strength and durability. We also pay close attention to the slope of the slab, ensuring that water drains away properly.

Whether you're building a new shed, garage, or other outdoor structure, Groundworks will work closely with you to ensure that your concrete slab is built to the highest standards. We handle everything from initial site preparation and excavation to final grading and cleanup. Our goal is to provide you with a solid foundation that will support your structure for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation and Excavation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 2: Formwork Installation – We install the forms that will shape the concrete.
Step 3: Reinforcement Installation – We install steel mesh or fiber to reinforce the concrete.
Step 4: Concrete Pouring and Curing – We pour and cure the concrete to ensure its strength and durability.

faq.question: How thick should a concrete slab be?
faq.answer: The thickness of a concrete slab depends on the intended use. A slab for a shed typically needs to be 4 inches thick, while a slab for a garage may need to be 5-6 inches thick.

faq.question: What is the purpose of steel mesh in a concrete slab?
faq.answer: Steel mesh provides tensile strength to the concrete, preventing it from cracking under stress.

faq.question: How long does it take for a concrete slab to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but it can be loaded after 7 days.

From residential driveways and patios in established neighborhoods like College Hill to commercial foundations and parking lots downtown, Groundworks has the experience and expertise to handle any project. We understand the specific soil conditions and weather patterns that affect concrete in the Wichita area, ensuring lasting results.

Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and customer satisfaction sets us apart. We use only the highest-grade materials and employ proven techniques to deliver durable and aesthetically pleasing concrete solutions. reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Groundworks did an outstanding job replacing my old, cracked driveway. They were professional, efficient, and the new driveway looks fantastic. The crew paid close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and a smooth finish. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: I'm thrilled with my new concrete patio! Groundworks helped me design the perfect outdoor space for my family. The stamped concrete looks amazing, and it's so easy to maintain. The team was punctual and kept the work area clean throughout the project.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Groundworks repaired several sections of my sidewalk that were cracked and uneven. They did a great job matching the existing concrete, and the repairs are barely noticeable. The price was fair, and the service was prompt.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: Groundworks poured the foundation for our new garage. They were very knowledgeable and professional, ensuring that the foundation was perfectly level and properly reinforced. We had some heavy rains during the curing process, and the Groundworks team took extra steps to protect the concrete. Excellent work!

reviews.name: John P.
reviews.text: I hired Groundworks to pour a concrete slab for my new shed. They did a fantastic job preparing the site and pouring a level, durable slab. I highly recommend them for any concrete project.

reviews.name: Susan R.
reviews.text: My driveway had several large cracks and potholes. Groundworks came out and repaired them quickly and efficiently. The repairs look great, and I'm confident they will last for years to come. Good communication and a fair price.
